blocks.body: A four-year engineering degree (B.Tech, or B.E. at some universities). You pick a branch — CSE, ECE, Mechanical and so on — and study core science, your specialisation, labs and projects. It's the broadest and most common technical degree in India, opening software, core-engineering, government and higher-study paths alike.

items.label: Course length
items.note: 8 semesters; lateral entry to year 2 for diploma holders

blocks.title: How you get in
blocks.body: JEE Main / Advanced, or a state CET (EAMCET, MHT-CET, KCET, WBJEE…).

blocks.title: At a glance
items: 23 IITs, 31 NITs and 26 IIITs sit alongside thousands of private & state colleges.
Your branch matters less than people say — many graduates switch fields.
Common next steps: a job, GATE → PSU / M.Tech, or an MS abroad.

blocks.title: Typical fresher CTC by experience
blocks.note: Indicative; varies widely by branch, company and city.
